ddls:
CREATE TABLE "subreddits" (
  "subreddit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each subreddit */,
  "subreddit_name" TEXT /* Name of the subreddit */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the subreddit */,
  "created_time" REAL /* Time the subreddit was created */,
  "subscribers" INTEGER /* Number of subscribers to the subreddit */,
  "rules" TEXT /* Rules and guidelines for the subreddit */,
  "moderators" TEXT /* List of moderators for the subreddit */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("subreddit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "content" (
  "content_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each piece of content */,
  "subreddit_id" INTEGER /* ID of the subreddit where the content was posted */,
  "self_id" TEXT /* Self ID of the content */,
  "parent_id" TEXT /* Parent ID of the content (if it's a comment) */,
  "time" REAL /* Time the content was posted (in Unix epoch time) */,
  "text" TEXT /* Text of the content */,
  "upvotes" INTEGER /* Number of upvotes the content has received */,
  "downvotes" INTEGER /* Number of downvotes the content has received */,
  "is_stickied" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the content is stickied */,
  "is_nsfw" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the content is not safe for work */,
  "sentiment_score" REAL /* Sentiment score of the content */,
  "media_url" TEXT /* URL of any media (images, videos) associated with the content */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who posted the content */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("content_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_content_subreddit_id FOREIGN KEY ("subreddit_id") REFERENCES subreddits ("subreddit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_content_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "created_time" REAL /* Time the user account was created */,
  "karma" INTEGER /* User's total karma */,
  "is_moderator" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the user is a moderator */,
  "is_gold" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the user has a gold membership */,
  "profile_picture" TEXT /* URL of the user's profile picture */,
  "location" TEXT /* User's location */,
  "about_me" TEXT /* User's about me section */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "engagement" (
  "engagement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each engagement event */,
  "content_id" INTEGER /* ID of the content that was engaged with */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who engaged with the content */,
  "engagement_type" TEXT /* Type of engagement (e.g., like, comment) */,
  "engagement_time" REAL /* Time the engagement occurred (in Unix epoch time) */,
  "engagement_score" INTEGER /* Score associated with the engagement */,
  "is_deleted" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the engagement has been deleted */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("engagement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_engagement_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_engagement_content_id FOREIGN KEY ("content_id") REFERENCES content ("content_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "content_id" INTEGER /* ID of the content that was commented on */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the comment */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "comment_time" REAL /* Time the comment was made (in Unix epoch time) */,
  "upvotes" INTEGER /* Number of upvotes the comment has received */,
  "downvotes" INTEGER /* Number of downvotes the comment has received */,
  "sentiment_score" REAL /* Sentiment score of the comment */,
  "is_deleted" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the comment has been deleted */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_content_id FOREIGN KEY ("content_id") REFERENCES content ("content_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analyst_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the analyst who accessed the data */,
  "content_id" INTEGER /* ID of the content that was accessed */,
  "access_time" REAL /* Time the data was accessed (in Unix epoch time) */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used for access */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the browser used for access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analyst_access_content_id FOREIGN KEY ("content_id") REFERENCES content ("content_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analyst_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
